item.title: RT by @StepFun_ai: i built a production research agent on step-3.7-flash by @StepFun_ai 20 lines of python. direct api call. no orchestration layer. here's what happened.the first thing in terminal:Th

item.description: <p>I gave <a href="https://nitter.net/NousResearch" title="Nous Research">@NousResearch</a> Hermes agent a company brain.<br /><br />I've been LOVING Hermes agent as my personal assistant but haven't been able to use it for work. <br /><br />AI agents are powerful but they are siloed. They don’t hav

item.title: RT by @Teknium: ⚕️ Hermes Tip of the Day:You can use Kanban for literally every workflow in Hermes Agent.✅ Deep research.✅ Large writing projects.✅ Coding.✅ You name it.This is the best way to keep yo
item.description: <p>⚕️ Hermes Tip of the Day:<br /><br />You can use Kanban for literally every workflow in Hermes Agent.<br /><br />✅ Deep research.<br />✅ Large writing projects.<br />✅ Coding.<br />✅ You name it.<br /><br />This is the best way to keep your projects organized and your agents focused and locked in

item.title: RT by @BrianRoemmele: This archive is exceptionally valuable—potentially transformative. Rescuing hundreds of thousands of mostly undigitized PhD dissertations (many last copies, physics-heavy, 1873–e
item.description: This archive is exceptionally valuable—potentially transformative. Rescuing hundreds of thousands of mostly undigitized PhD dissertations (many last copies, physics-heavy, 1873–early 2000s) preserves irreplaceable scientific thought processes, overlooked ideas, and historical context lost to pre-dig

item.title:
RT by @l2beat: Presenting now, @l2beat on providing open-source research and analytics on Layer 2s and public protocols, including interoperability, DA, and ZK infrastructure.
A few wins from them: -
item.description:
Presenting now, @l2beat on providing open-source research and analytics on Layer 2s and public protocols, including interoperability, DA, and ZK infrastructure.
A few wins from them: - New Interoperability page and the entire infrastructure around it - Token registry covering 3,000+ token deploymen

item.title:
R to @l2beat: See you at the Community Space! If you're at the venue, come by to say hi to Luca and chat about all things L2s. 🤝
Check the full schedule 👇
https://futura.camp/schedule

item.title: The damage this #FTX shit show and the subsequent fall out is doing to the crypto space will take us years to recover.
item.description: The damage this #FTX shit show and the subsequent fall out is doing to the crypto space will take us years to recover.

item.title: Ankit Gupta Joins YC as General Partner, Bringing Deep ML Expertise
item.description: <p>We&#x2019;re thrilled to announce that Ankit Gupta is joining YC as our newest General Partner.</p><p>Ankit has already worked with dozens of YC founders as a visiting partner in recent batches. He has a rare blend of deep machine learning expertise and firsthand startup experience that make him<

item.title: Meesho Goes Public
item.description: Meesho goes public today. From S16 to IPO, they’ve built one of India’s largest e-commerce platforms—empowering millions of small merchants to grow their businesses.Congrats to Vidit and Sanjeev on a decade of relentless building and listening to users!

item.title: BillionToOne Goes Public — The Startup That Made Genetic Testing Universal
item.description: Today, BillionToOne goes public, becoming YC's fourth publicly traded biotech company. More importantly, they have built one of the most important genetic tests in the U.S. Today, 1 in 11 babies born in the US are tested with BillionToOne's fetal genetic test.

item.title: YC x Coinbase RFS: Build Onchain
item.description: We are entering the era of Fintech 3.0.Regulatory clarity, growing consumer adoption, and low-cost chains have paved the way for a golden age of building in crypto — and at YC, Base, and Coinbase, we want to fund builders to seize this moment.

item.title: Congratulations to EquipmentShare on Going Public
item.description: Today, EquipmentShare (YC W15) goes public. From Missouri to 373 locations nationwide, they've built the operating system construction has been missing—built by contractors, for contractors. Congrats to Jabbok, Willy, and the EquipmentShare team on a huge milestone.

item.title: Diana Hu Is YC's Newest Managing Partner
item.description: We're thrilled to announce that Diana Hu has been promoted to Managing Partner at Y Combinator.Few people have built a startup from zero and also shipped tech to 100 million people. Diana has done both.
